steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The word “continues” in “continues to use Apollo's data” is crucial: it shows researchers still employ this data today, decades after the missions ended.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Ongoing” expresses value that persists over time rather than being confined to a single period, which matches what researchers' continued use of Apollo's data demonstrates. A contradicts active use, C focuses only on the original period, and D has no support. That matches choice B — B is correct.
